nodes.label: halfvec Quantization
nodes.rationale: halfvec halves vector storage vs float4 and speeds HNSW scans at negligible recall loss for 768-dim embeddings.

nodes.label: Content-Hash Dedup
nodes.rationale: Skip re-embedding unchanged docs by comparing a content_hash, avoiding wasteful Ollama calls on re-sync.

nodes.label: Delete Reconciliation
nodes.rationale: Prune docs deleted upstream by diffing remote IDs vs stored IDs; empty-remote safety guard prevents mass-deletion.

nodes.label: Windowed Ingest Concurrency
nodes.rationale: Batch pages into windows processed concurrently to raise ingest throughput without unbounded fan-out.

nodes.label: Embedding Dimension Contract (768)
nodes.rationale: Embedding model dim must match the halfvec column dim; a mismatch fails chunk inserts, so dimension is a deploy-time contract.
